ops.title: Fast-lane economics blind spots: post_squash_below_floor + staged-over-committed pricing
ops.description: Accepted v1 cuts from the fast-lane landing (see intercept.rs::fast_lane_entries scope-cut comment). (1) Controller::post_squash_below_floor prices only the staged batch — blind to fast-lane removals, so the floor check can pass on a turn the lane already shrank below it. (2) When a staged recode renders over a COMMITTED lane key, the controller prices savings against ORIGINAL bytes, overstating them (wire already carried the smaller D→E→A bytes). Fix both by feeding fast-lane rendered sizes into the pricing inputs.

ops.text: staged-over-committed savings priced against lane bytes, not originals
